description: A compliance officer has received opt-out requests from 10 consumers who must be added to the company's internal Do Not Call (DNC) list. Log into the Vicidial admin interface at http://localhost/vicidial/admin.php (user: 6666, password: andromeda) and add all 10 phone numbers from ~/Documents/VicidialData/dnc_optout_requests.txt to the system-wide Internal DNC list so that no campaign in the dialer can call these numbers.
